DeleteElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
DeleteElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.privateIpAddress: The private IP address to delete, supports IPv4 or IPv6
DeleteElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
